name: FluidType
description: Source fluid type.\nTo update FluidType, drag drop a fluid over this source.\nPlace a fluid in your simulation library to modify it.

name: CompBasis
description: Source composition basis for M vector

name: RxnRateBasis
description:
Global fluid equilibrium reaction rate basis.
     Absolute: Reaction rates represent absolute molar rates of change. 
     Per Unit Feed: Reaction rates are normalized based on the feed flow 
         rate. Representing the molar change per unit feed, they become
         independent of the absolute flow rate (preferred).

Both options yield identical results, but require different formulations
in the reaction Rate model. “Per Unit Feed” is recommended due to
better numerical stability when stream flows approach zero rate.
Starting with v2023 fluid reactions are defaulted to the "Per Unit Feed"
option.  The "Absolute" option is retained for compatibility with
simulations built before v2023 and will be removed in a future release.

name: StandardProperties
description: Source StandardProperties option to calculate standard liquid volumetric flowrate\nbased on pure components specific gravity, SG60F, which is at 60 F and 1 atm

name: Flow
description:
Source Reference options for flow.
    Reference: use the molar flow value from the reference port.
    Source: specify either W, F, or Q
 Be prepared to remove one pressure specification in the flow line right after switching to Fluid Flow and Dynamics modes, since the flowrate will be determined through the reference.

name: Pressure
description: Source Reference options for pressure\n     Reference: use the pressure value from the reference port.\n     Source: specify variable P in this source.

name: Enthalpy
description: Source Reference options for enthalpy\n     Reference: use the enthalpy value from the reference port.\n     Source: specify variable T, VF or H in this source.

name: Composition
description: Source Reference options for composition\n     Reference: use the molar composition value from the reference port.\n     Source: specify variable M in this source.

name: ModeCheck
description: Global check for mode change warnings while still in process mode

name: FRramp
description:
Global flow parameter to ramp from forward stream
conditions to reverse stream conditions.

For steady state simulations, use a value smaller than
the smallest flowrate in your simulation.

For dynamic simulations, the FRramp will cause the
thermodynamic state calculations to use the forward
enthalpy/composition when the flow is greater than
FRramp, reverse enthalpy/composition when flow is
less than negative FRramp, and ramp the values in
between negative FRramp and FRramp as flow reversal
takes place.

A larger value will smooth out sudden discontinuities
for dynamics but stream properties may appear wrong
near zero flow in steady state simulations.

name: Elevations
description:
Global selection to enable the specification of equipment port elevations.
     Disabled: disable specifications for port elevations.  The elevation change (DE) can still be specified in the Pipe and PipeRig models.
     Manual: manually specify port elevations. DE in the Pipe and PipeRig models can be swapped for port elevation specifications.
     Automatic: automatically calculate port elevations using equipment geometry and configuration options for select models (Column, Drum, etc).

When automatic elevations are enabled, an elevation specification must be removed from each inlet stream of impacted models (for example, remove the DE specification from an inlet Pipe).
Other model elevations must still be manually specified. For an explanation of how port elevations are estimated, see each model's help file.

name: Phases
description:
Source option to override the fluid phase selection
     Fluid: The FluidType's phases are applied.
     Vapor: The phases are set to Vapor.
     Liquid: The phases are set to Liquid.
     VLE: The phases are set to VLE.
     VLWE: The phases are set to VLWE.
     VLLE: The phases are set to VLLE.

name: PhaseNoOverride
description: Source PhaseOverride parameter defaulted to NoOverride which is used for the connection to the State.PhaseOverride when Phases = Fluid

name: OutFlashCheck
description: Source compulsory check for out flash temperature
